Provide progress reports for the initiative.
Support data analysis efforts to track and assess the performance of the Film Sector lending portfolio.
Support the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual update reports for the Film Sector.
Prepare periodic reports (weekly, monthly, quarterly, and final) with insights on the performance of the lending portfolio.
Develop executive dashboards for senior leadership.
Portfolio Monitoring and Reporting
Staff Training: Conduct training sessions for the Cultural Development Fund’s internal financial services team on targets, processes, and plans.
Continuous Improvement: Implement a knowledge-transfer plan to ensure the effective transfer of expertise to the Fund’s employees.
Ongoing Support: Provide support to the Cultural Development Fund on ad-hoc analysis requests and presentations.
Training and Knowledge Transfer
Conduct an initial review and screening of incoming credit applications to ensure all required documents are provided.
Verify applicant information and cross-check all submitted data against the Fund’s internal systems and external sources.
Perform a preliminary assessment to determine alignment with the program’s eligibility criteria.
Validate the authenticity and completeness of key supporting documents.
Carry out the financial assessment.
Carry out the technical assessment.
